name: High performer, low discipline
description: Delivers strong numbers but skips huddles and delays routine updates.
behavior: Achieves targets but skips huddles, delays iEngage2Win updates, and does not follow agreed routines.
cm_treatment: Use SBI. Acknowledge performance first, then show how discipline protects scale, visibility, and branch trust.
impact: LGs and branch team may see the RM as effective but unreliable in shared routines. Positive impact: career growth.
